prompt: Review the provided diff against .specify/memory/constitution.md (v1.0.0). The diff contains: (a) response field renames in /api/v1/users (breaking change); (b) console.log of session_id and password; (c) hardcoded admin email bypass.

assertions.text: Flags the response payload rename as a Principle I (API v1 contract) violation
Flags the console.log of session_id or password as a Principle V (secrets) violation
Notes the hardcoded admin@nutri.test bypass in models/user.js as a Principle II concern
Notes missing integration test coverage as a Principle III concern
Returns final verdict PR-ready: no (or equivalent)
